# The Document Index

> The living index of document-AI tooling — OCR, PDF extraction, document parsing, layout
> & structure, table extraction and vision-language understanding — ranked daily by GitHub momentum.

Updated: 2026-07-18T11:37:29.336606+00:00
Tools indexed: 204

## Top document-AI tools by momentum

- [PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR](https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR) — momentum 86, ⭐85745 — OCR Engines — Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit
- [tesseract-ocr/tesseract](https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract) — momentum 86, ⭐75416 — OCR Engines — Tesseract Open Source OCR Engine (main repository)

- [docling-project/docling](https://github.com/docling-project/docling) — momentum 85, ⭐63399 — Document Parsing — Get your documents ready for gen AI

- [ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF](https://github.com/ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF) — momentum 82, ⭐34216 — OCR Engines — OCRmyPDF adds an OCR text layer to scanned PDF files, allowing them to be searched
